title: Take It or Leave It
writer: Mac Benoff, Harold Buchman, Snag Werris
actors: Phil Baker, Edward Ryan, Madge Meredith
plot: Young sailors Eddie Collins and Herb Gordon eagerly begin their shore leave in New York City, where they are greeted at the dock by Eddie's wife Kate. Kate, who is pregnant for the first time, is fearful about her condition, as he...
